## invalid UTF-8 snippet text

Internal warning: Invalid UTF-8; replacing invalid bytes with U+FFFD
│
│  In snippet text (for SnippetBuilder.Build at render_test.go:369)
│
│  'a' (0x61), 0xFF, 0xAB, 0xFE, 'b' (0x62)
│              ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ replacing indexes 1-3
│
│ context: this may be a bug in the program constructing this diagnostic

## label span starts inside a UTF-8 codepoint

Internal warning: Label span starts inside a UTF-8 codepoint; dropping label "starts inside é"
│
│  In snippet text (for SnippetBuilder.Build at render_test.go:369)
│
│  'x' (0x78), 0xC3, 0xA9, 'y' (0x79)
│                    ^^^^ label.span.start = 2
│              ---------- codepoint "é"
│
│ context: this may be a bug in the program constructing this diagnostic

## label span ends inside a UTF-8 codepoint

Internal warning: Label span ends inside a UTF-8 codepoint; dropping label "ends inside é"
│
│  In snippet text (for SnippetBuilder.Build at render_test.go:369)
│
│  'x' (0x78), 0xC3, 0xA9, 'y' (0x79)
│                    ^^^^ label.span.end = 2
│              ---------- codepoint "é"
│
│ context: this may be a bug in the program constructing this diagnostic

## label span starts inside a grapheme cluster

Internal warning: Label span starts inside a grapheme cluster; dropping label "starts inside the emoji cluster"
│
│  In snippet text (for SnippetBuilder.Build at render_test.go:369)
│
│  'x' (0x78), 0xF0, 0x9F, 0x91, 0xA9, 0xE2, 0x80, 0x8D, 0xF0, 0x9F, 0x92, 0xBB, 'y' (0x79)
│                                                        ^^^^ label.span.start = 8
│              ---------------------------------------------------------------- grapheme cluster "👩‍💻"
│
│ context: this may be a bug in the program constructing this diagnostic

## label span ends inside a grapheme cluster

Internal warning: Label span ends inside a grapheme cluster; dropping label "ends inside the emoji cluster"
│
│  In snippet text (for SnippetBuilder.Build at render_test.go:369)
│
│  'x' (0x78), 0xF0, 0x9F, 0x91, 0xA9, 0xE2, 0x80, 0x8D, 0xF0, 0x9F, 0x92, 0xBB, 'y' (0x79)
│                                      ^^^^ label.span.end = 5
│              ---------------------------------------------------------------- grapheme cluster "👩‍💻"
│
│ context: this may be a bug in the program constructing this diagnostic

## byte visualization elides distant context

Internal warning: Label span starts inside a UTF-8 codepoint; dropping label "starts inside é"
│
│  In snippet text (for SnippetBuilder.Build at render_test.go:369)
│
│  ..., 'h' (0x68), 'i' (0x69), 'j' (0x6a), 0xC3, 0xA9, 'k' (0x6b), 'l' (0x6c), 'm' (0x6d), ...
│                                                 ^^^^ label.span.start = 11
│                                           ---------- codepoint "é"
│
│ context: this may be a bug in the program constructing this diagnostic
